name: Black Cat Syndicate Limited
analysis: It is coming off a base, 34% below its one-year high, so there is room to run. Volume is expanding (1.7× the 20-day average) — real participation. RSI has turned up through its signal line. Trade idea: entry A$1.1000, stop A$0.8465, target A$1.2500 (0.59:1) — then trail it.
